widget.name: OnlyOffice
widget.description: Embed an OnlyOffice Docs editor in a Mendix web page.

property.caption: Document server URL
property.description: Base URL of your OnlyOffice Document Server, for example https://office.example.com

property.caption: JWT token
property.description: Optional token generated by your backend when JWT is enabled on Document Server.

property.caption: Document URL
property.description: Absolute URL where Document Server can download the file.

property.caption: Document key
property.description: Optional stable unique document version key. If empty, the widget derives one from Document URL.

property.caption: Document title
property.description: Optional file name shown in OnlyOffice. If empty, the widget derives it from Document URL.

property.caption: File type
property.description: Optional file extension without dot. If empty, the widget derives it from Document URL or title.

property.caption: Document type
property.description: Fallback OnlyOffice editor document type. When File type can be detected, the widget chooses the correct type automatically.

property.caption: Mode
property.description: Edit or view mode.

property.caption: Editor type
property.description: OnlyOffice UI type.

property.caption: Language
property.description: Editor language code, for example zh-CN or en.

property.caption: Callback URL
property.description: Backend endpoint that receives OnlyOffice save callbacks.

property.caption: Height
property.description: Editor height in pixels.

property.caption: User ID
property.description: Current user identifier passed to OnlyOffice.

property.caption: User name
property.description: Current user display name passed to OnlyOffice.

property.caption: Edit
property.description: Allow document editing.

property.caption: Download
property.description: Allow document download.

property.caption: Print
property.description: Allow printing.

property.caption: Review
property.description: Allow reviewing changes.

property.caption: Comment
property.description: Allow comments.

property.caption: On ready
property.description: Triggered when the editor is ready.

property.caption: On document state change
property.description: Triggered when document modified state changes.

property.caption: On error
property.description: Triggered when OnlyOffice reports an error.
